name: detector reads source from stdin when --stdin and synthetic --filename are supplied
command: echo 'const x: any = 1;' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --stdin --filename "src/virtual.ts" 2>out.json; grep -E '"filename":"src/virtual.ts"' out.json 1>&2 && grep -E '"ruleId":"no-any"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2 || { echo FAIL 1>&2; exit 2; }; exit 1
